title: Calonemorchis georgei
intro: Calonemorchis georgei is a species of orchid, a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Orchidaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects, making it beneficial for treating wounds, infections, and skin conditions. The bioactive constituents of Calonemorchis georgei include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and alkaloids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. In traditional medicine, Calonemorchis georgei is often used to make herbal preparations such as infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are used to treat a range of health conditions.

Calonemorchis georgei is further classified into the subfamily Orchidoideae, which includes many terrestrial orchids.
